text:
It was a warm summer evening. Tom sat on his porch swing watching the sunset.

Suddenly there was a loud honk.

The door flew open.

A strange creature, half giraffe-half hippo trotted in excitedly.

"I want ice cream!" it said.

It pawed at Tom hysterically.

"What do you think?" said Tom.

"I think you owe me ice cream!"

That night came the sweet aroma.

Tom thoughtfully looked out his window.

"I think I owe you some ice cream."

A hippo bounced into his house.

"I think I owe you two!"

They spent an entire day enjoying their ice cream.

Thereafter they decided that every Sunday night was ice cream hour.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
